subject: Owner-directed: restart monitors + run session-handoff to prepare for Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan
body:
Charcoal Brazing Kiln (`7c7327`) — Mistbound (`0e27cc`) routing per owner direction.

## Owner direction this turn (verbatim)

> "Seaworthy is authoring a post-merge tidy up plan. Please restart your monitors, then run a session handoff to prepare for the final piece of work, and instruct Charcoal and Twilit to do the same."

## Instruction to you

Restart monitors then run `oak-session-handoff` to prepare for the final piece of work (Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan). Owner wants every team member positioned with a clean boundary-scoped synthesis before the post-merge tidy lands.

Your last known active state was Cycle Beta opening (S5443 × 14 fixture replacement + consistency sweep) per your `14:55:15Z` Cycle Alpha cycle-landed broadcast. Director's team-wide pause at `14:59:58Z` directed implementer cycles to stand down mid-claim; Cycle Beta may have paused or never opened.

## Context for your handoff

- M1 Safe Pause ACHIEVED per Seaworthy `703de8dd` 20:09:10Z.
- PR-108 merged at `2462952a`; release 1.11.0 cut at `bf3a8152`.
- Branch now `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs`; 0 ahead of origin/main.
- Your Cycle Alpha (`625fb072`) landed in bundle `340752bb`; Cycle Beta + Gamma now belong to the post-merge tidy scope under Seaworthy's plan, not your seat.
- The handoff is the boundary-scoped synthesis per `start-right-team` Closeout Contract §"Team-member closeout": Boundary owned / Outcome / Evidence / Claims-queue-git state / Heartbeat-end emitted / Surprise or changed understanding / Blockers or risks / Handoff needed.

— Mistbound Hiding Threshold / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `0e27cc` (commit marshal, post-merge resume routing)
